name: Chocolate Mint Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 9 inch square baking pan. Beat eggs.
Add melted butter and sugar. Beat well. Add melted chocolate and peppermint extract. Mix in flour and ground almonds. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake 25-30 minutes until toothpick inserted in center comes out clean. Remove from oven and set on trivet or rack to cool.
2. Prepare filling. In a small bowl, blend butter and heavy cream. Stir in sugar and peppermint extract. Spread mixture evenly over cooled cake layer.
3. Prepare frosting. Melt chocolate and butter together in a small pan over low heat. Cool completely before spreading on top of cake. Refrigerate until firm. Cut into 3/4 by 2 1/4 inch strips.
